title: smoky spicy venezuelan cheese quesadilla
description: A Venezuelan dish featuring a crispy outside and gooey, cheesy inside with a kick of heat. Perfect for a festive meal or snack.

ingredients.name: 2 large tortillas
ingredients.notes: look for corn tortillas for a more authentic taste

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together queso fresco, mayonnaise, smoked paprika, oregano, and cayenne pepper (if using).
Place a large tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle a quarter of the cheese mixture on half of the tortilla.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the cheese and cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the other side is also crispy and golden.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients to make 3 more quesadillas.
Cut the quesadillas into wedges and serve hot on a talavera plate with cilantro on top.
